notes: process_violation: no_clarifying_question — the model produced a multi-section structured implementation advisory (Strengths, Pre-Submission Questions, MRM Submission checklist, Risk Level) that treats the proposal as sound and low-risk, entirely bypassing discovery: there is no problem statement, no personas, no MVP bounding, no out-of-scope items, no genuine assumptions (only pre-submission operational questions), and critically no mention of the FMA prescribed fairness methodology gap, CCCFA obligations, or 2023 MRM independent validation requirement — the most consequential regulatory risks in the input.
